---
title: "Teaching"
---

## 2026 Spring — Quantitative Marketing Analytics

University of Liverpool Management School

**Topics covered:**

- Customer Analytics & Segmentation
- Predictive Modelling for Marketing
- NLP and Text Analytics
- Machine Learning Model Evaluation
- Data Visualisation for Marketing

**Student resources:**

- [HCT Digital Marketing Lab](https://hct-digital-marketing-ai-lab.onrender.com) — Interactive ML lab
- [Feedback Form](https://student-feedback-form-04kh.onrender.com) — Weekly session feedback

---

## Teaching Philosophy

I teach marketing analytics with a focus on **interpretability over complexity** — every model output should translate into a clear marketing decision or insight. Students from non-technical backgrounds should leave with both conceptual understanding and practical skills.

---

## Previous Terms

- **2025 Fall** — Machine Learning for Marketing, Data Visualisation, Intro to Deep Learning
